note: Merchant connector registry. Affiliate IDs live here (config), never in product records or page markup. The link builder resolves a product's outbound URL from {merchant, merchantRef} plus this config, in priority order: (1) the merchant's own direct affiliate program if its affiliateId is set; (2) the content-monetisation aggregator wrap if defaults.aggregator.publisherId is set and the merchant is not in excludeMerchants; (3) a plain direct link. Turning on monetisation is a one-line change — set a merchant's affiliateId, or set the aggregator publisherId to cover everything at once.

aggregator.notes: Umbrella auto-monetisation. When publisherId is set, every store link is wrapped EXCEPT merchants that have their own direct affiliateId (listed in excludeMerchants so their better direct rate wins). Skimlinks format shown; Sovrn Commerce alternative: https://redirect.viglink.com/?format=go&key={publisherId}&u={url} — swap wrapTemplate + network to switch.

bellzi.name: Bellzi
bellzi.notes: Direct in-house, 5% flat. Requires public socials + monthly tagged posts. Confirm exact link/param format on approval; affiliateParam is the common Shopify default.

blippo.name: Blippo
blippo.notes: Direct in-house program; rate disclosed on approval. Confirm exact link format when accepted.

uwumarket.name: uwu Market
uwumarket.notes: GoAffPro self-serve portal. GoAffPro uses ?ref= tracking; confirm on signup.

sugoimart.name: Sugoi Mart
sugoimart.notes: Monetised via the Sovrn Commerce aggregator (merchant #228534), not a direct on-store program. Covered automatically by the aggregator layer when using Sovrn as the wrap network; left OUT of excludeMerchants so the wrapper handles it.

sanrio.name: Sanrio
sanrio.notes: No confirmed direct publisher program on sanrio.com. Monetise via the aggregator layer only. Aggregator-supplied ~4% / 14-day figures are unverified.

squishable.name: Squishable
squishable.notes: No direct program found (affiliate paths 404, no network listing). Monetise via the aggregator layer only.

japanla.name: JapanLA
japanla.notes: No direct program found. Monetise via the aggregator layer only.

kawaiipenshop.name: Kawaii Pen Shop
kawaiipenshop.notes: Their 'affiliate program' is product-review/seeding (gifting for creators), not commission-per-sale. Contact info@kawaiipenshop.com if pursuing gifting. Commission monetisation via aggregator layer only.

cutethingsfromjapan.name: Cute Things From Japan
cutethingsfromjapan.notes: No direct program found. Monetise via the aggregator layer only.

amazon.name: Amazon
amazon.notes: ref = ASIN. Tag live; earns once Amazon products are ingested and the account clears 3 qualifying sales. Use OneLink for geo-routing later. No products use this merchant yet.

etsy.name: Etsy
etsy.notes: ref = Etsy listing ID. Awin application pending. No products use this merchant yet.

ebay.name: eBay
ebay.notes: ref = eBay item ID. Good for rare/retired collectibles. No products use this merchant yet.
